title: Periodontal Disease and Poor Oral Hygiene: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Treatment
description: Syzygium aromaticum essential oils, also known as clove oil, have been found to help with periodontal disease due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of clove oil include eugenol, which has been shown to reduce bacteria and inflammation in the mouth. When used in combination with other treatments, clove oil can help to reduce plaque, prevent tooth decay, and alleviate symptoms of gum disease such as pain and swelling.
